headline: Aimee Lou Wood Brings Cheeky British Humor to Late-Night Sketch Comedy
lede: British comedy darling Aimee Lou Wood stepped into the hosting spotlight for a raucous evening of comedy, delivering sharp-witted commentary on her breakout roles.
body:
Aimee Lou Wood transformed Saturday Night Live's UK edition into a comedic playground this weekend, leveraging her breakthrough performances in *Sex Education* and *The White Lotus* for maximum laughs.

The actor, known for her disarmingly honest comedic style, seamlessly navigated the show's sketch landscape with trademark British self-deprecation. Wood's monologue skewered her recent television successes, transforming her most recognized roles into comedic fodder that resonated with the live studio audience.

Her *Sex Education* references highlighted the show's groundbreaking approach to teenage sexuality, while her *White Lotus* commentary played with the series' sardonic undertones. Each sketch demonstrated Wood's remarkable range, shifting between vulnerable authenticity and razor-sharp comedic timing.

The performance underscored Wood's growing status as a cross-platform comedy sensation, cementing her reputation beyond streaming dramatic roles. Her ability to deconstruct her own public persona while delivering pitch-perfect comedic beats suggests a bright future in late-night and sketch comedy formats.
key_facts: Wood hosted SNL UK weekend edition
Delivered monologue poking fun at her own roles
Demonstrated comedic range beyond dramatic performances
